disclaimer: These entries are a triage aid only. Helplines and routing change by state — verify on the official state police, health, disaster, or MHA portal before acting.

national.label: Single emergency number (ERSS)
national.notes: Pan-India emergency access; may route to police, fire, or ambulance depending on jurisdiction.

national.label: Police (legacy toll-free, where still published)
national.notes: Many states route legacy numbers into 112 — prefer 112 if unsure.

national.label: Fire emergency
national.notes: Commonly listed alongside 112; confirm with your state fire / disaster portal.

national.label: Ambulance / medical (state schemes vary)
national.notes: 108 is widely advertised in several states; 112 may also dispatch medical help — verify locally.

national.label: Women in distress (national helpline)
national.notes: Published as national women helpline — confirm on Ministry of Women & Child Development / state portal.

national.label: Childline India
national.notes: National child helpline — verify on Childline India / NCPCR official pages.

national.label: National cybercrime helpline
national.notes: For online financial fraud reporting — also use cybercrime.gov.in portal.

national.label: Anti human trafficking helpline (commonly listed)
national.notes: Widely cited nationally — confirm on MHA / MWCD official advisories.

national.label: Disaster / SDMA public helpline (commonly listed)
national.notes: Often referenced for state disaster control rooms — confirm with your State Disaster Management Authority.
